title: helia amplissima
intro: Helia amplissima, also known as the giant heliotrope, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Helia amplissima include soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, tinctures, and ointments, often used to treat various skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
